assertions.title: Dry-run e2e validates existing PR linkage contract

steps.action: Query database for threads with linked PRs
steps.expected: Find at least one thread with github_pr.number
Command exits successfully with diagnostics JSON and PR link verification message
steps.observed: Exit code 0, complete diagnostics JSON output, 'Dry-run PR link verified' message present

evidence.verificationMessage: Dry-run PR link verified: thread 0e28b4ab-a354-4856-b9a0-35ecf0710e91 -> PR #103

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-CLI-007: Dry-run e2e validates existing PR linkage contract - Successfully verified that dry-run mode returns exit code 0, complete diagnostics JSON, and explicit PR link verification message.
